faqs.question: Why are silverfish so common in Morningside Heights apartments?
faqs.answer: Morningside Heights has many pre-war and historic buildings with older plumbing, basement storage areas, and humidity issues that create ideal conditions for silverfish. These pests thrive in damp, dark spaces commonly found in bathroom walls, under sinks, and in building basements throughout the neighborhood.
